title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 52.130 - Branch office — records — deputies (certain third class counties)
text:
52.130.  Branch office — records — deputies (certain third class counties). — It shall be the duty of the collectors of the revenue of such counties to keep the tax books of such townships as may be under the jurisdiction of said district number 2 of the circuit court of that county in said branch office, and to keep one or more deputies in said office to attend to the duties thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 11071, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9900; 1919 § 12892 
Effective 1-02-79
